name: MLReef
description: Collaborative ML platform combining Git-based code, data and pipeline sharing with experiment tracking.

seo.title: MLReef — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: MLReef: Collaborative ML platform combining Git-based code, data and pipeline sharing with experiment tracking.

when_to_use: Collaborating on ML experiments with Git-based versioning
Building reproducible data science pipelines in shared workspaces
Managing model and dataset versioning for distributed ML teams
Running ML pipelines in a GitHub-like collaborative environment

cons: Feature set overlaps with more popular tools
review.verdict: A niche Git-style ML collab tool; most teams will be better served by MLflow or DVC.
review.best_for: Small ML groups wanting a self-hosted GitLab-like experience for models
review.not_for: Teams already standardized on MLflow, DVC or Weights & Biases
